name: github-enterprise-ai-proxy
description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that routes traffic across a pool of GitHub PATs (GitHub Models, Copilot API, REST). Quota-aware fill_first routing with hot-reload and a Chinese-labeled /quota dashboard.

scripts.lint: node --check bin/github-enterprise-ai-proxy.js && node --check lib/quota-client.mjs && node --check lib/quota-cache.mjs && node --check lib/quota-dashboard.mjs && node --check lib/copilot-session.mjs && node --check lib/copilot-usage.mjs && node --check bin/ghe-quota-status.cjs && node --check bin/ghe-swap-account.cjs && node --check bin/ghe-mint-oauth.cjs && node --check bin/ghe-invite-user.cjs
